## [00:00 - 01:25]

Okay, this one's going to be super short and sweet. These are the email checklists. We've actually got several different versions of these. We've got one for broadcast emails, and we've also got one for you for automated emails. And as you notice, these ones are for MailChimp, and we've also provided checklists if you use HubSpot. Now, obviously there's a lot of different email marketers you can use. Using these checklists is not a substitute for using the video tutorials, but these are just really to help you along, give you full confidence, and just make sure that you've got something that you can print off and put beside you and just go step by step by step. And just to kind of read through this really quick, you'll see, you know, this gives you everything from knowing what you click and where you go to what you fill in. It's got some reminders just, you know, in terms of like what are best best practices in order to maximize your results, and even gives you like a pre-send checklist just to double check. So you can have 100% confidence when you hit that send button, everything is going to work perfectly. So same thing with the automated emails. And with the automated emails, obviously this is something you're going to do, not just one email at a time, but you're going to create these more in sequences. But hopefully having this will give you a little bit more confidence, and you can get those emails sending and making some money.
